mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO service_stage(case_id, stage_key, stage_name, stage_order, status, assigned_member_id, started_at) VALUES( #{caseId}, #{stageKey}, #{stageName}, #{stageOrder}, #{status}, #{assignedMemberId}, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END )
mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS id, s.case_id AS caseId, s.stage_key AS stageKey, s.stage_name AS stageName, s.stage_order AS stageOrder, s.status AS status, s.deliverable_text AS deliverableText, s.deliverable_url AS deliverableUrl, s.student_feedback AS studentFeedback, DATE_FORMAT(s.submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS submittedAt, DATE_FORMAT(s.completed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS completedAt FROM service_stage s JOIN student_service_case c ON c.id = s.case_id WHERE c.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY s.stage_order ASC

SELECT id, case_id AS caseId, stage_key AS stageKey, stage_name AS stageName, stage_order AS stageOrder, status, deliverable_text AS deliverableText, deliverable_url AS deliverableUrl, student_feedback AS studentFeedback FROM service_stage WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE service_stage SET status = 'WAITING_CONFIRMATION', deliverable_text = #{deliverableText}, deliverable_url = #{deliverableUrl}, student_feedback = NULL, submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND case_id = #{caseId} AND status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_AGENT')
